title: A1 speaking performance prompt
prompt: Speak for an appropriate length about a familiar or academic topic at A1 level. Include clear ideas, examples and interaction where possible.

title: A1 writing performance prompt
prompt: Write a text appropriate to A1 level. Organise ideas clearly, use suitable vocabulary and check accuracy.
